case_title: DA FU ERIC ZHENG VS. S.C. LIANG DBA HARBOR VILLA RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,838.00 FILED BY ZHENG, DA FU ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT S.C. LIANG DBA HARBOR VILLA RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-10-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DA FU ERIC ZHENG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT S.C. LAING DBA HARBOR VILLA RESTURANT IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DE PENG, RESTAURANT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER RE: DISMISSAL; CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT S.C. LIANG DBA HARBOR VILLA RESTAURANT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. ON MAR-20-17 PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APR-10-17 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DA FU ERIC ZHENG. NO APPEARANCE BY S.C. LIANG DBA HARBOR VILLA RESTAURANT.
